data.body: Bug#7 (b3e5) idempotence+--force: validated (mutation-checked the skip test has teeth), claimed, pushed Gerrit 514. LIVE VALIDATION of bug#2: a stale index.lock (240s) from a crashed/concurrent op blocked the b3e5 claim on the CURRENT deployed rebar (which lacks #2's reclamation); manually reclaimed it to proceed — exactly the self-heal #2/512 adds. ALL 10 bugs now have fixes produced or in-flight: MERGED 510(#5); IN REVIEW 508(#4) 509(#1) 512(#2) 513(#3) 514(#7); SUBAGENTS running #6(d220 entrypoint) #8(406f grounding) #9(7a41 runbook) #10(9d7c hung-worker+runbook). Landing gated on CI (deep macos queue). Next: validate+push #6/#8/#9/#10 as subagents return; submit+close each ticket as its change hits Verified+1 (ff main checkout from GERRIT remote before close).
